blockers.type_of_obstruction: Missing Parameters | Ambiguous requirements | Contradictory requirements
blockers.description: Standalone explanation of WHY this blocks correct implementation. No leak, no self-reference, no other blocker ids. <= 2-3 sentences.
blockers.resolution: The exact answer (values/format/case/spacing). Include Example and Counterexample when helpful. Resolves ONLY this blocker; no hidden parameters that answer other blockers.
trigger_questions: Vary phrasing: What / How / Should I / Which / Is it.
Each must be relevant only to this blocker's decision space.
